meta.description: Backend implementation details for a Detailed Design — one instance per design.

serviceId.description: UUID of the Service being implemented.

featureToggleId.description: UUID of the controlling Feature Flag.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_094d63ad_9687_4583_953e_3aee364d0f13" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "service_id" UUID,
    "gradle_module" TEXT,
    "feature_toggle_id" UUID,
    "admin_action_constant" TEXT,
    "notes" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_094d63ad_9687_4583_953e_3aee364d0f13" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_094d63ad96874583_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_094d63ad96874583_service_id" FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_094d63ad96874583_feature_toggle_id" FOREIGN KEY ("feature_toggle_id") REFERENCES items(id)
)
